title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Croma

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Croma
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Croma in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
